step_rationale: Oxidized LDL variant; potent inflammatory signal in plaque.
mechanism: Electronegative LDL (L5) is a highly oxidized lipoprotein subspecies that triggers monocyte recruitment and macrophage activation, amplifying plaque inflammation.

references.title: Comparative Analysis of Atherogenic Lipoproteins L5 and Lp(a) in Atherosclerotic Cardiovascular Disease.
The Oxidized Lipoproteins In Vivo: Its Diversity and Behavior in the Human Circulation.
Detection of a High Ratio of Soluble to Membrane-Bound LOX-1 in Aspirated Coronary Thrombi From Patients With ST-Segment-Elevation Myocardial Infarction.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
